summary: Pack 2 Commercial Workflow testing complete. All 16 features tested and working correctly. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
seed_data_creation: Created test quotes and leads via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 2 Commercial Workflow testing complete. All features working: Quote Editor, Quote-to-Order conversion, CRM Create Quote, Business Settings, Quick Price Check widget.

1_put_quotes_v2_update.details: Updates line items, customer info, pricing, notes - persists in MongoDB

2_put_quotes_v2_reject_converted.details: Returns 400 status when trying to edit converted quotes

3_quote_editor_route.details: QuoteEditorPage renders with prefilled data from backend

4_quote_editor_customer_panel.details: Shows customer details panel with company, name, email, phone, notes fields

5_quote_editor_line_items.details: Shows line items with QuoteLineDescriptionField, qty, unit price, auto-calculated total

6_quote_editor_add_remove_items.details: Add Item button (+) and Remove Item button (trash) visible and functional

7_quote_editor_pricing_summary.details: Pricing summary shows subtotal, tax rate input, discount input, calculated total

8_save_quote_button.details: Save Quote button persists changes via PUT and shows success toast

9_save_and_send_button.details: Save & Send button saves then marks quote as 'sent'

10_crm_create_quote.details: Create Quote button in drawer creates real draft and navigates to /admin/quotes/{id}

11_crm_related_quotes_clickable.details: Related quotes in drawer are clickable and navigate to quote preview

13_quote_preview_convert_to_order.details: Convert to Order button converts approved quote to order and navigates to /admin/orders

14_business_settings_page.details: Page loads with all sections: Business Identity, Contact Details, Banking Details, Document & Tax Settings

15_quick_price_check_widget.details: Widget visible with Base Price input and Check button

16_regression_admin_pages.details: All admin pages load correctly without regression

traceability_chain_verified.request_to_lead: Leads show source_request_id and converted_from_request flag
traceability_chain_verified.lead_to_quote: Quotes show lead_id linking back to source lead
traceability_chain_verified.quote_to_order: Orders show quote_id and quote_number linking back to source quote
